subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-16
subcodes.first_line: The Baha'is should sacrifice life in the path of each other... It must be so that each one of the friends should prefer others to himself.
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies
